arabic: وَعَنْهُ عَنِ النَّبِيِّ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ قَالَ فِي الَّذِي يُدْرِكُ صَيْدَهُ بَعْدَ ثَلَاثٍ: «فكله مَا لم ينتن» . رَوَاهُ مُسلم

english.text:
He reported the Prophet as saying about one who comes three days later on the game he has shot, “Eat it, provided it has not a stench.”

Muslim transmitted it.

chapter.english: Game and Animals Which May Be Slaughtered
